title: A Dragon's Welcome
story: Ignavarr the Dragon greets you with a warm rumble. 'Welcome to Embral, {player}! I've been waiting for a brave explorer. Before we begin our big adventures, could you help me find the glowing coin near the platforms? It helps me keep the Hearthveil lights bright!'
research_basis: Vygotsky's Zone of Proximal Development — scaffolding basic navigation before complex tasks.

steps.instruction: Walk to the brown platform near the center.

scaffolding: If stuck, a golden trail will appear leading to the coin. Ignavarr will whistle if you're going the wrong way.
